arguments.command:
# Sync all agent workspaces and other key repos
repos=(
  "/Users/landonking/.agents"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-alpha-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-beta-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-gamma-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-zeta-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-eta-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-main"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-general-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-coding-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-product-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-marketing-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-infra-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-legal-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/hermes-agent"
  "/Users/landonking/openclaw-army"
)

for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  if [ -d "$repo/.git" ]; then
    cd "$repo"
    changes=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
      git add -A && git commit -m "auto-sync: version save $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" 2>&1
      # Push to any remote called 'github' or 'origin'
      for remote in github origin; do
        if git remote get-url "$remote" &>/dev/null; then
          git push "$remote" HEAD 2>&1 | tail -1
          break
        fi
      done
      echo "✅ Synced: $repo"
    else
      echo "⏭️  No changes: $repo"
    fi
  else
    echo "⏭️  No git: $repo"
  fi
done
